_META.source: Original 866 entries generated from NZ/AU SEEK job data via Gemini and Groq APIs (intern project). Expanded and fully regenerated April 2025.
_META.generated_by: regenerate_skills_map.py — Claude Haiku (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) with ASCM SCOR, ILO ISCO-08, O*NET Job Zones as classification anchors.
_META.usage: Loaded by classify_jobs_nz_v2.py and classify_jobs_au_v2.py as a precision lookup layer. Matched against Job_Title_Clean first, then raw Job_Title as fallback. skills value is merged into AI_Skills_v2 alongside DOMAIN_SKILL_FIXED. level value provides a seniority hint that takes priority over LEVEL_MAPPING keyword inference when an exact title match is found.
_META.update_instructions: Re-run regenerate_skills_map.py to regenerate all entries. Add new titles to the NEW_TITLES list in that script before running.
